data.body:
PASS 1 review — T10 (Infrastructure / IaC) [overlay]: NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS.

This plan is about test-coverage infrastructure (producer↔consumer snapshot contract tests, hermetic-but-honest fixtures, verified fake client, applier consolidation, sub-op telemetry, bidirectional round-trip probes). It does not provision or configure any cloud resources, IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), or Kubernetes/Helm. Live-sandbox e2e and cross-team Pact are explicitly out of scope; fixtures are deliberately on-disk/in-process. The T10 overlay therefore does not apply and no findings are raised.

Affirmations: T10 not-applicable (no infra provisioning/IaC in scope).
